label: 31. Full Unlocks Ownership
summaryPreview:
Unlocks.gd Summary

## Progression/Unlock Data Ownership

The script owns the central unlock registry via `UNLOCK_MAP` (line 1416), which organizes all upgrade data by category:
- `mothership_unlocks`: Mothership tech upgrades
- `support_unlocks`: Support unit upgrades  
- `drone_unlocks`: Drone upgrades

Each category contains individual shop items (e.g., `shop_Laser_Damage`, `shop_Health`, `shop_Laser_Delay`, `shop_Shield_Health`, `shop_Shield_Regen`) with properties:
- `unlocked`: Boolean unlock status
- `title`: Display name
- `tier`: Upgrade tier level
- `icon`: Resource path (e.g., `res://assets/images/random_pics/main_icon2.png`)
- `description`: Player-facing description including unlock text
- `passive_unlocks`: Array of unlock criteria (e.g., `OBJECT_KEYS.mothership_laser_kill`)
- `active_unlocks`: Array of purchase criteria (e.g., `OBJECT_KEYS.slag` or numeric values like `"1"`)
- `overcharge`/`options`: Configuration objects
